description: Play a complete round with every class.
hint: Simply play one full round from start to finish as all 9 classes. You can do this against bots in Training mode.

description: Play a complete game on 2Fort, Dustbowl, Granary, Gravel Pit, Hydro, and Well (CP).
hint: Play a full match on these 6 original launch maps. Hydro rarely appears in casual, so look for a community server.

description: Accumulate 25000 heal points as a Medic.
hint: This will unlock naturally as you play Medic. Keep your healing beam on injured teammates.

description: Set five enemies on fire in 30 seconds.
hint: Flank a group of enemies on a payload cart or control point and spray your flamethrower wildly.

description: Accumulate 10 sentry gun kills with a single sentry.
hint: Build a Level 3 Sentry in a high-traffic choke point (like the Dustbowl tunnels) and keep it repaired.

description: Get five revenge kills.
hint: When a player kills you 3 times in a row without you killing them, they become your Nemesis. Kill them to get a Revenge kill.

description: Get five kills in a row without dying.
hint: Play cautiously. Heavy with a Medic, or a Sniper hanging in the backline, are the easiest ways to achieve this.

description: Trick an opposing Medic into healing you.
hint: Disguise as an enemy Heavy, Soldier, or Demoman, call for Medic (E), and run toward an enemy Medic.

description: Play in a game with five or more players from your Friends list.
hint: Join a community server and invite 5 Steam friends to the lobby.

description: Win 20 games.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play and win casual matches or community server rounds.

description: Accumulate 1000 total kills.
hint: Unlocks naturally over time. All classes count towards this.

description: Get 25 headshots as a Sniper.
hint: Use the Sniper Rifle and aim for the head. Fully charged shots are not required, just the headshot kill.

description: Play a full round without killing any enemies, and score the highest on a team of 6 or more players.
hint: Unequip your Syringe Gun/Melee to avoid accidental kills. Focus entirely on healing, assisting, and capping objectives.

description: Heal a teammate who's taking fire from 4 enemies at once.
hint: Heal a Heavy while they are pushing into a heavily defended capture point or payload cart.

description: Work with 2 other Medics to deploy 3 simultaneous ÜberCharges.
hint: Coordinate with two other Medics in voice/text chat. Activate all three ÜberCharges at the exact same time out of spawn.

description: Have an ÜberCharge ready before the Setup phase ends.
hint: During the 60-second pre-round setup (on Attack/Defend or Payload maps), heal teammates continuously until your meter hits 100%.

description: Deploy 3 ÜberCharges in less than 5 minutes, and assist in 5 kills during that time.
hint: Use the default Medi Gun. Stay alive, constantly heal damaged teammates (which builds Über faster), and pop them on damage-dealing classes.

description: Deploy an ÜberCharge within 8 seconds of a nearby enemy Medic deploying his.
hint: When an enemy Medic pushes into your team with an ÜberCharge, immediately trigger your own to counter them.

description: In a team with no Medics, be the first person to switch to Medic after a teammate calls for 'Medic!', and then heal 500 health.
hint: If your team has no Medic and you see a chat callout for one, immediately switch in spawn and go heal them.

description: Deploy an ÜberCharge on a teammate less than a second before they're hit by a critical explosive.
hint: Requires luck and timing. Pop your ÜberCharge on a teammate just as a glowing (critical) rocket or grenade is about to hit them.

description: Block the enemy from capturing a control point with an ÜberCharged teammate.
hint: Deploy an ÜberCharge on a teammate while both of you are standing on your control point that enemies are currently capping.

description: Assist a fellow Medic in killing 3 enemies in a single life.
hint: Heal another Medic while they run around with the Blutsauger or Ubersaw killing enemies.

display_name: Does It Hurt When I Do This?
description: Kill 50 Scouts with your syringe gun.
hint: Aim ahead of the Scout's movement path, as syringes are slow projectiles with an arc.

description: Kill 10 Medics with your bone saw.
hint: Use the Ubersaw or standard Bonesaw. Flank enemy Medics and melee them.

description: Assist a Heavy in killing 10 enemies, where neither of you die.
hint: Pocket a skilled Heavy player on a defensive map like Dustbowl. Stay in cover while healing them.

description: Assist in killing 3 enemies with a single ÜberCharge on a Scout.
hint: Use the Kritzkrieg or standard Über on a highly skilled Scout who can quickly two-shot enemies with the Scattergun.

description: Assist in burning 5 enemies with a single ÜberCharge on a Pyro.
hint: Über a Pyro as they drop into a tight space (like a payload cart) surrounded by enemies.

description: Assist in punching 2 enemies with a single ÜberCharge on a Heavy.
hint: Have a Heavy equip the KGB or Fists. Über him and have him run at enemies to punch them to death.

description: Assist in destroying 5 enemy Engineer buildings with a single ÜberCharge on a Demoman.
hint: Über a Demoman with a Stickybomb Launcher into an Engineer 'nest' (multiple sentries/dispensers grouped together).

description: Heal an Engineer as he repairs his sentry gun while it's under enemy fire.
hint: When your team's Engineer is tanking damage to save his sentry, keep your healing beam on him so he doesn't die.

description: Assist in killing 3 enemies on an enemy control point, in a single life.
hint: Heal a Soldier or Demoman as they push onto an enemy capture point and clear out the defenders.

description: Heal 200 teammates after they've called for 'Medic!'.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Pay attention to the chat and the red cross icons above teammates' heads.

description: Win 2Fort with a shutout.
hint: Capture the intelligence 3 times without letting the enemy team capture yours once.

description: Win Well in 5 minutes or less.
hint: Coordinate a fast push with Scouts and Medics on CP_Well to steamroll the points before the enemy sets up.

description: Win Hydro without giving up a capture.
hint: Hydro is a Territorial Control map. Win the overall map without losing a single sub-round to the enemy.

description: Successfully defend Dustbowl without giving up a capture.
hint: On defense, hold the very first capture point (Stage 1, Point A) until the timer runs out.

description: Successfully defend Gravel Pit without giving up a capture.
hint: On defense, prevent the attacking team from capturing Point A or Point B until time runs out.

description: Extinguish 100 burning teammates.
hint: Healing a burning teammate with the Medi Gun quickly extinguishes them. Do this 100 times.

description: Assist in killing 20 nemeses.
hint: Heal teammates who are fighting players that are dominating them (indicated by a specific icon over the enemy's head).

description: Kill 2 enemies in a single life, while having your ÜberCharge ready, but undeployed.
hint: Build your Über to 100%, then switch to your syringe gun or melee to kill 2 enemies without activating it.

description: Hit enemies with your bonesaw 5 times in a row without dying or missing.
hint: Corner a slow class like a Heavy or ambush distracted players. Make sure every single click connects with an enemy.

description: Accumulate 7000 heal points in a single life.
hint: Play defensively. Stay behind cover, constantly heal teammates, and retreat if your team wipes.

description: Accumulate 10000 heal points health in a single life.
hint: Very difficult. Play on a long payload or attack/defend map, stay entirely in the backline, and never take risks.

description: Accumulate 1 million total heal points.
hint: A lifetime grind achievement. Just play Medic regularly and this will pop eventually.

description: Kill an enemy Spy that you have been healing.
hint: If you realize you are healing a disguised Spy, immediately switch to your Ubersaw or Syringe Gun and kill them.

description: Save a falling teammate from dying on impact.
hint: If a teammate is launched high into the air with low health, heal them before they hit the ground so they survive the fall damage.

description: ÜberCharge 2 teammates at once.
hint: While your ÜberCharge is active, quickly swap your healing beam back and forth between two teammates. The invulnerability lingers for 1 second.

description: Provide an enemy with a freezecam shot of you taunting above their ragdoll.
hint: Kill an enemy, stand directly over their dead body, and press the Taunt button (G) immediately.

description: Use your bonesaw to kill a spy who has been calling for 'Medic!'.
hint: Spies often spam 'Medic!' to blend in. If you suspect one, pull out your melee and hit them.

description: ÜberCharge 5 of your Steam Community Friends.
hint: Play in a party with Steam friends and pop an Über on each of them over time.

description: Join a game that one of your friends is in and then deploy an ÜberCharge on him.
hint: Join a friend's server via the Steam overlay, play Medic, and Über them.

description: Be healing a teammate as he achieves an achievement of his own.
hint: Keep your healing beam on players frequently. Unlocks naturally over time as newer players earn basic achievements.

description: Assist in exploding 5 enemies with a single ÜberCharge on a Soldier.
hint: Über a Soldier when pushing a crowded room or point. A Kritzkrieg Über is highly effective for this.

description: Achieve 10 of the achievements in the Medic pack.
hint: Unlocks the Blutsauger.

description: Achieve 16 of the achievements in the Medic pack.
hint: Unlocks the Kritzkrieg.

description: Achieve 22 of the achievements in the Medic pack.
hint: Unlocks the Ubersaw.

description: Use your shotgun to finish off 20 players you've ignited.
hint: Light an enemy on fire with the Flamethrower, then quickly switch to the Shotgun to deal the killing blow.

description: Have 2 enemy Scouts on fire at the same time.
hint: Spray fire wildly into groups of enemies. Eventually, you'll hit a cluster containing two Scouts.

description: Force 10 burning enemies to jump into water.
hint: Play on maps with water, like 2Fort. Ambush enemies near the bridge; their natural reaction will be to jump in the water to douse the fire.

description: Kill 15 players while you're dead.
hint: Afterburn is your friend. If you ignite an enemy and they kill you, but they burn to death shortly after, it counts.

description: Ignite 5 Spies who have a sapper on a friendly building.
hint: Act as a 'Pybro'. Hang out near your team's Engineers and spray fire around their buildings to catch Spies.

description: Ignite 5 enemies carrying your intelligence.
hint: Camp your own intelligence room on CTF maps like 2Fort or Turbine.

description: Ignite 10 cloaked Spies.
hint: Constantly 'spy-check' by puffing flames into empty corners and choke points.

description: Ignite 10 enemies that have recently used a teleporter.
hint: If you find an enemy teleporter exit, hide nearby instead of destroying it. Burn enemies as soon as they warp through.

description: Kill 3 enemies in a row, all within the same area.
hint: Find a tight corner or doorway and ambush enemies with the Flamethrower as they pass through.

description: Kill 3 people with your axe in one life.
hint: The Axtinguisher makes this easier. Ignite an enemy, then quickly melee them for critical damage.

description: Kill 6 people with your axe in one life.
hint: Use the Axtinguisher and play extremely carefully, picking off isolated targets.

description: Ignite 10 disguised Spies.
hint: Spy-check everyone on your team. If they catch fire, they are a Spy.

description: Ignite 10 Snipers while they are zoomed in.
hint: Flank the enemy battlements on 2Fort or Doublecross and ignite Snipers looking through their scopes.

description: Ignite 3 Medics that are ready to deploy an ÜberCharge.
hint: Look for Medics with crackling electricity on their Medi Gun. Flank and burn them before they pop the charge.

description: Kill 50 Heavies with your flamethrower.
hint: Ambush Heavies from behind. Circle-strafe around them so they have trouble tracking you with their Minigun.

description: Kill 10 enemies while you're both underwater.
hint: The Neon Annihilator weapon guarantees crits against wet players, making this much easier.

description: Kill 3 enemies in a single ÜberCharge.
hint: Have a Medic Über you into a crowded room, like the final point on Dustbowl.

description: Destroy 50 Engineer buildings.
hint: Circle-strafe around Sentry guns faster than they can track you, or use the Homewrecker melee weapon.

description: Ignite 50 enemies capturing one of your control points.
hint: Play defense on Payload or CP maps. Drop onto the point when enemies are clustering to capture it.

description: Kill 500 enemies.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Pyro.

description: Do 1 million points of total fire damage.
hint: A long-term grind achievement. Keep playing Pyro and focus on setting groups of enemies on fire.

description: Kill an enemy with a taunt.
hint: Equip the standard Flamethrower. Taunt (G) near an unaware enemy (like a Sniper) to execute the deadly Hadouken taunt.

description: Ignite an enemy Spy while he's flicking a cigarette.
hint: Very situational. You must catch a Spy using their Disguise Kit taunt (flicking a cigarette) and burn them.

description: Cause a dominated player to leave the server.
hint: Dominate an enemy (kill them 4 times without dying). When they eventually disconnect from the server, this unlocks.

description: Kill 3 enemies while they're taunting.
hint: Look for enemies using group taunts (like the Conga) or showing off after a kill, and burn them.

description: Ignite a rocket-jumping Soldier while he's in midair.
hint: Use the Flare Gun or Detonator to snipe an airborne Soldier.

description: Provide enemies with freezecam shots of each of your taunts.
hint: Kill an enemy and immediately taunt with your Primary, Secondary, and Melee weapons over different kills.

description: Ignite an enemy, and the Medic healing him.
hint: Spray fire into a Medic/Heavy combo. Both will easily catch fire.

description: Kill 50 enemies with your flamethrower, from behind.
hint: Use the Backburner, which deals critical damage from behind, to quickly rack up these kills.

description: Kill a burning enemy who was ignited by another Pyro.
hint: Use the Flare Gun, Axtinguisher, or Shotgun to finish off enemies that another friendly Pyro just lit up.

description: Kill a Soldier with a reflected critical rocket.
hint: Watch for glowing, crackling rockets (crits). Time your right-click (Airblast) perfectly to send it back at the Soldier.

description: Kill 1000 enemies.
hint: Unlocks naturally over a long playtime.

description: Ignite 100 enemies with the flare gun.
hint: Equip the Flare Gun secondary and spam it down choke points or at Snipers.

description: Reflect 100 projectiles with your compressed air blast.
hint: Use right-click (Airblast) to deflect rockets, grenades, stickies, arrows, or jarate. 100 total will pop this.

description: Kill an enemy in the same second that he kills you.
hint: Very common as Pyro due to afterburn. You die to bullets, but they burn to death immediately after.

description: Achieve 10 of the achievements in the Pyro pack.
hint: Unlocks the Flare Gun.

description: Achieve 16 of the achievements in the Pyro pack.
hint: Unlocks the Backburner.

description: Achieve 22 of the achievements in the Pyro pack.
hint: Unlocks the Axtinguisher.

description: Achieve 10 of the achievements in the Heavy pack.
hint: Unlocks the Sandvich.

description: Achieve 16 of the achievements in the Heavy pack.
hint: Unlocks the Natascha.

description: Achieve 22 of the achievements in the Heavy pack.
hint: Unlocks the K.G.B. (Killing Gloves of Boxing).

description: Take 1000 points of damage in a single life.
hint: Have a Medic constantly heal you while you tank damage on the front lines.

description: Kill 50 enemies within 3 seconds of them attacking your Medic.
hint: Protect your Medic. If someone shoots them, immediately gun that player down.

description: Kill 10 enemies with a Medic assisting you, where neither of you die.
hint: Play defensively with a dedicated Medic on a map like Dustbowl.

description: Earn a domination for a Medic who's healing you.
hint: Kill the same player 4 times without dying, while your Medic is connected. This shares the Domination with the Medic.

description: Kill an enemy with a taunt.
hint: Equip the Fists (or variants), stand near an unaware enemy, and taunt to do the 'Showdown' finger-gun kill.

description: Kill 10 enemies carrying your intelligence.
hint: Defend your intel room on maps like 2Fort or Turbine.

description: Work with a friendly Medic to kill an enemy Heavy & Medic pair.
hint: When you encounter a mirrored Heavy/Medic combo, focus down the Heavy first, then the Medic.

description: While invulnerable and on defense, block an invulnerable enemy Heavy's movement.
hint: When both you and an enemy Heavy are ÜberCharged, literally stand in front of him to block his path.

description: Block the enemy from moving the payload cart 25 times.
hint: Stand near the payload cart while on the defending team to halt its progress.

description: Get ÜberCharged 50 times.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Heavies are prime targets for Medics to Über.

description: Kill 20 enemies while being recharged by a dispenser.
hint: Stand right next to a friendly Engineer's dispenser while firing into a choke point.

description: Get 25 enemy kills where you either assist or are assisted by another Heavy.
hint: Stick near other Heavies on your team and shoot the same targets.

description: Remove 20 stickybombs by killing the Demomen who produced them.
hint: If you see a sticky trap, find and kill the Demoman. His death removes the active stickies.

description: Kill 50 enemies while both you and your victim are underwater.
hint: Camp the underwater routes on maps like 2Fort or Well.

description: In a single life, get shot, burned, bludgeoned, and receive explosive damage.
hint: Have a Medic pocket you, then purposefully take a little damage from bullets, fire, melee, and rockets.

description: Get 20 kills on players that you're dominating.
hint: Once you dominate a player (4 kills), keep hunting them down.

description: Survive a direct hit from a critical rocket.
hint: If you have full health or are Overhealed by a Medic, you will survive a crocket (which usually deals 270 damage).

description: Get 1000 assists.
hint: Spray damage onto groups of enemies so teammates can finish them off.

description: Kill or assist in killing 10 cloaked Spies.
hint: Spray your minigun into random corners and choke points to catch invisible Spies.

description: Kill 5 enemies without spinning down your gun.
hint: Hold right-click to stay spun up. Inch around a corner on defense and mow down the attackers.

description: Fire $200,000 worth of minigun rounds in a single life.
hint: Stand next to a Dispenser and just hold down left-click for about 5 continuous minutes.

description: Kill an enemy with a critical punch.
hint: The KGB (Killing Gloves of Boxing) grants crits on a kill, making subsequent punches critical.

description: Heal 1000 damage with med-kits in a single life.
hint: Camp near a large health pack, take damage, heal, repeat. (Eating the Sandvich does not count).

description: Kill an enemy with your shotgun while you're out of minigun ammo.
hint: Waste all your minigun ammo into a wall, then run around with the shotgun and get a kill.

description: Be the first on your team to start capturing a control point in a round.
hint: Equip the Gloves of Running Urgently (GRU) to run fast to the mid-point on a 5CP map.

description: Get 50 caps on payload maps.
hint: Ride the payload cart to the end. The cart heals you and dispenses ammo, making Heavy ideal for pushing.

description: Kill 10 enemies in mid-air with the minigun.
hint: Track jumping Scouts or rocket-jumping Soldiers with the minigun.

description: Kill 25 enemies while you're standing on a control point you own.
hint: Stand firmly on a defensive point and shoot anyone who tries to step on it.

description: Kill 15 enemies capturing a control point you own.
hint: Defend the point. Easiest when enemies pile onto the point in desperation.

description: Help 5 teammates get revenge on their nemeses.
hint: Assist teammates in killing people who are dominating them.

description: Kill an enemy in the first 5 seconds after you exit a teleporter.
hint: Spin up your gun immediately upon exiting an aggressive teleporter.

description: Provide an enemy with a freezecam shot of you taunting while invulnerable.
hint: While ÜberCharged by a Medic, kill an enemy and immediately taunt.

description: Eat 100 sandviches.
hint: Equip the Sandvich secondary. Find a safe corner, taunt to eat it, refill at a supply closet, and repeat.

description: Kill 50 Scouts using Natascha.
hint: The Natascha slows enemies down, making it extremely easy to track and kill fast-moving Scouts.

description: Kill 10 Heavies with The K.G.B.
hint: Ambush enemy Heavies from behind with the Killing Gloves of Boxing.

description: Get the first kill in an Arena or Competitive match.
hint: Arena mode is mostly dead, but you can achieve this by playing Competitive mode and rushing for the first kill.

description: Kill 5 enemies with the First Blood crit buff in an Arena match.
hint: In Arena, getting First Blood gives you 5 seconds of crits. Use it to quickly kill another enemy. Requires community servers since Arena is inactive.

description: Kill a player in Well before the round starts.
hint: On CP_Well, run out immediately during the setup phase gates opening and snipe someone with the pistol.

description: Get 2004 lifetime kills.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Scout. 2004 refers to the year the original TF2 was announced/planned heavily.

description: In a single life, kill an enemy while you are on the ground, in the air, and in the water.
hint: Best done on 2Fort. Get a normal kill, jump during a firefight for an air kill, and hunt someone in the sewers for a water kill.

description: Destroy 3 teleporter entrances.
hint: Flank all the way to the enemy spawn using your speed, and destroy the teleporters placed just outside their doors.

description: Destroy 3 enemy buildings while they are still under construction.
hint: Shoot buildings as the Engineer is hauling or deploying them, when their health is very low.

description: Destroy an active sentry gun using your pistol.
hint: Find a distracted sentry (shooting a teammate) or edge out of its line of sight and chip away its health with the pistol.

description: Achieve 10 of the achievements in the Scout pack.
hint: Unlocks the Force-A-Nature.

description: Achieve 16 of the achievements in the Scout pack.
hint: Unlocks the Sandman.

description: Achieve 22 of the achievements in the Scout pack.
hint: Unlocks the Bonk! Atomic Punch.

description: Perform 1000 double jumps.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Spam spacebar while running around as Scout.

description: Kill 3 enemies while under the effects of a Medic's ÜberCharge.
hint: Have a Medic pop a Kritzkrieg or standard Über on you while you ambush a group of enemies.

description: Kill an enemy Heavy and take his Sandvich.
hint: If a Heavy drops a Sandvich for a teammate, run up, shoot the Heavy, and steal the healing item.

description: Kill a Medic that is ready to deploy an ÜberCharge.
hint: Use your speed to bypass the frontline, find the glowing Medic, and two-shot them with the Scattergun.

description: Survive 500 damage in one life.
hint: Keep retreating to health packs or a Medic. Do not push aggressively.

description: Kill 20 players while double-jumping.
hint: Jump over players heads in close combat and shoot down at them with the Scattergun.

description: Capture the enemy intelligence 25 times.
hint: Play CTF maps (2Fort, Turbine). Scout is the best class for grabbing the intel and running.

description: Capture the enemy intelligence 3 times in a single CTF round.
hint: Win a game of CTF single-handedly by grabbing and capping all three briefcases.

description: Dodge 1000 damage in a single life using your Bonk! Atomic Punch.
hint: Drink Bonk and run directly into a Level 3 Sentry. Run back to spawn, refill the drink, and repeat.

description: Cause an environmental death or suicide using the Force-A-Nature's knockback.
hint: On maps like Upward or Sawmill, shoot enemies near cliffs/saws with the FaN to blast them off.

description: Kill or assist kill 50 enemies while they are stunned or slowed.
hint: Use the Sandman baseball to slow enemies, or assist Heavies using Natascha.

description: Cause an environmental death by stunning or slowing an enemy.
hint: Hit an enemy with a Sandman ball right as they jump near a pit, causing them to fall in.

description: Stun 2 Medics that are ready to deploy an ÜberCharge.
hint: Hit a fully charged Medic (crackling weapon) with the Sandman ball.

description: Stun 50 enemies while they are capturing a point or pushing the cart.
hint: Spam Sandman baseballs at the payload cart or active capture points.

description: Stun an enemy for the maximum possible duration by hitting them with a long-range ball.
hint: Launch a Sandman ball across the map (like across the 2Fort bridge). If it hits, it deals max slow duration.

description: Stun a Scout with their own ball.
hint: Pick up a ball thrown by an enemy Scout (it restores your ball ammo), then hit them back with it.

description: Kill a Scout while they are under the effect of Crit-a-Cola.
hint: If you see a Scout glowing purple (mini-crits), kill them. They take extra damage while it's active.

description: Kill 50 enemies from behind with the Force-A-Nature.
hint: Use your speed to flank Snipers and Heavies, blast them in the back at point-blank range.

description: Capture the last point in a CP map.
hint: Scouts capture points 2x faster. Back-cap the final point on maps like Granary or Badlands.

description: Capture three capture points in a row in one life.
hint: Stay alive during a steamroll on a 5CP map like Granary or Process, ensuring you step on each point.

description: Start capping a capture point within a second of it becoming available.
hint: Stand just off a locked point, and step onto it the exact millisecond your team captures the prerequisite point.

description: Initiate 10 point captures that ultimately succeed.
hint: Be the first person to step onto a point, and stay alive until the capture finishes.

description: Block 50 point captures.
hint: Step onto a control point that enemies are currently capturing to stall their progress.

description: Kill an opposing player that has your intelligence while holding theirs.
hint: In CTF, grab the enemy intel, run into the enemy doing the same to your base, and kill them.

description: Steal and then capture the enemy intelligence without firing a shot.
hint: Equip Bonk! Atomic Punch to bypass sentries, grab the intel, and run back without clicking M1.

description: Run 25 kilometers.
hint: Unlocks naturally. You are the fastest class, just keep moving.

description: Bat an enemy 25 meters.
hint: Equip the Sandman, stand next to an AFK player or Sniper, and taunt to do the home-run kill.

description: Jarate an enemy that you're dominating.
hint: Dominate an enemy (4 kills), then throw Jarate (the urine jar) at them.

description: Provide an enemy with a freezecam shot of you doffing your hat.
hint: Kill an enemy with the Sniper Rifle and immediately taunt.

description: Get 3 kills with the Sniper Rifle without missing a shot.
hint: Aim for slow targets like Heavies or stationary Snipers. Fully charged body shots guarantee kills on light classes.

description: Capture the flag in CTF.
hint: Pick up the enemy briefcase and return it to your base.

description: Kill 1000 enemies.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Sniper.

description: In a single round, get a kill with 3 different weapons.
hint: Get a kill with the Rifle, switch to SMG for a kill, then finish someone with the Kukri.

description: Headshot 10 enemy Snipers.
hint: Sniper duels are common. Aim for the other Sniper's head.

description: Destroy 3 Engineer sentry guns.
hint: A fully charged Sniper shot deals massive damage to buildings from a safe distance.

description: Kill a fully invisible Spy in a single hit.
hint: Requires luck. Shoot a fully charged shot into a choke point and hope a cloaked Spy walks into it.

description: Kill a Scout in midair with your Sniper Rifle or the Huntsman.
hint: Track double-jumping Scouts. The Huntsman (bow) has large hitboxes making this easier.

description: Provide an enemy with a freezecam shot of you waving to them.
hint: Kill an enemy with the SMG or Kukri and taunt.

description: Dominate an enemy Sniper.
hint: Kill the same enemy Sniper 4 times without dying.

description: Kill 10 Spies with your Kukri.
hint: When you hear a Spy de-cloak behind you or throw Jarate on one, chop them with the Kukri.

description: Headshot an enemy Demoman.
hint: Simple. Just aim for the Demoman's head.

description: Kill a rocket or grenade-jumping enemy in midair with your Sniper Rifle or the Huntsman.
hint: Track Soldiers flying through the air and snipe them before they land.

description: In a single life, kill 3 enemies while they are achieving an objective.
hint: Snipe enemies who are actively standing on a capture point or pushing the payload cart.

description: Get 5 kills with the Sniper Rifle without your scope.
hint: Use no-scope shots to finish off low-health enemies at close range.

description: Kill a Medic that is ready to deploy an ÜberCharge.
hint: Headshot a Medic whose Medi Gun is sparking with electricity.

description: Get backstabbed 50 times.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Snipers are prime targets for Spies.

description: Kill an opponent within the first second of a round.
hint: Charge a shot while the setup gates are closed, and fire the millisecond they open.

description: Headshot an enemy player the moment his invulnerability wears off.
hint: Track an ÜberCharged enemy, wait for the shiny texture to fade, and fire.

description: Top the scoreboard 10 times on teams of 6 or more players.
hint: Get lots of headshots and objective captures to farm points.

description: Kill a spy whose backstab attempt was blocked by your Razorback.
hint: Equip the Razorback. When a Spy stabs it and gets stunned (loud electric sound), quickly turn and melee him.

description: Jarate 4 enemy players with a single throw.
hint: Throw Jarate onto a heavily populated payload cart.

description: Jarate an enemy and the Medic healing him.
hint: Throw Jarate on a Heavy/Medic combo pushing your team.

description: Use Jarate to reveal a cloaked Spy.
hint: If you hear a Spy cloak nearby or bump into them, throw Jarate to short out their cloak.

description: Extinguish a burning teammate with your Jarate.
hint: Throw Jarate at a teammate who is on fire to instantly extinguish them.

description: Pin an enemy Heavy to the wall via his head.
hint: Use the Huntsman bow. Headshot a Heavy who is standing near a wall to pin his ragdoll.

description: Kill a Heavy & Medic pair with the bow.
hint: Equip the Huntsman and spam arrows into the combo until both die.

description: Take down an intelligence carrier with a single arrow.
hint: Use a fully drawn Huntsman arrow to kill the scout carrying your intel.

description: Hit an enemy with 3 arrows, without killing them.
hint: Spam un-drawn (weak) arrows into a Heavy's body.

description: Score 5 assists with the Jarate in a single round.
hint: Throw Jarate into a crowd. Whenever your team kills coated enemies, you get assist credit.

description: Jarate and then kill 3 enemies with your Kukri.
hint: The Bushwacka melee weapon guarantees critical hits on Jarate'd enemies, making this trivial.

description: Stab an enemy with an arrow.
hint: Equip the Huntsman. Taunt near an enemy to perform the Skewer taunt kill.

description: Kill an enemy with an arrow while you're dead.
hint: Fire an arrow right before you die. The projectile has travel time, so it can hit and kill after you drop.

description: Backstab 3 Snipers in a single life.
hint: Sneak into the enemy battlements on 2Fort or Doublecross and stab the distracted Snipers.

description: Provide an enemy with a freezecam shot of you flicking a cigarette onto their corpse.
hint: Equip the Disguise Kit and taunt immediately after killing an enemy.

description: Backstab a disguised Spy.
hint: If you see an enemy Spy disguised as your team, get behind them and stab them.

description: Backstab the enemy that you're currently disguised as.
hint: Disguise as an enemy Sniper, walk up behind that specific Sniper, and stab them.

description: Stab an enemy while fencing.
hint: Equip your Knife, stand near an unaware Sniper, and taunt to execute the Fencing kill.

description: Backstab a Medic who has healed you in the last 5 seconds.
hint: Disguise as an enemy Heavy, call for Medic, and when they heal you, turn around and stab them.

display_name: The Man with the Broken Guns
description: Backstab an Engineer, then sap 3 of his buildings within 10 seconds.
hint: Stab an Engineer in his nest, then quickly switch to the Sapper and place it on his Sentry, Dispenser, and Teleporter.

description: Sap an enemy building, then backstab the Engineer who built it within 5 seconds.
hint: Place a sapper to distract the Engineer, wait for him to turn around to fix it, and stab him.

description: Backstab an enemy and the Medic healing him within 10 seconds of each other.
hint: Stab the Heavy first, then quickly chase down and stab the fleeing Medic.

description: Backstab your Steam Community friends 10 times.
hint: Join a server on the opposite team as your Steam friends and hunt them down.

description: Dominate a Sniper.
hint: Camp the enemy battlements and repeatedly backstab the same Sniper 4 times.

description: While cloaked, bump into an enemy cloaked Spy.
hint: Happens randomly in tight corridors. You will see a faint shimmer when you bump into them.

description: Kill a gun-wielding Spy with your knife.
hint: If an enemy Spy pulls out their Revolver, run up and stab/butterknife them.

description: Survive 30 seconds after being ignited while cloaked.
hint: Use the Spycicle or Dead Ringer to mitigate fire, and run to health packs to stay alive.

description: Kill a Sniper after your backstab breaks his Razorback.
hint: Stab the Razorback (which stuns you), wait for the stun to end, then pull out your Revolver and shoot him.

description: Kill an Engineer who is working on a sentry gun.
hint: Backstab an Engineer while he is hitting his building with a wrench.

description: Start capping a capture point within a second of it becoming available.
hint: Hide cloaked on the next locked control point and de-cloak the moment your team caps the previous one.

description: Kill an enemy while you're being healed by an enemy Medic.
hint: Disguise, trick a Medic into healing you, then backstab someone in front of them.

description: Kill 15 enemies who are standing on a control point they own.
hint: Backstab players guarding their last point.

description: Backstab an enemy who is dominating 3 or more of your teammates.
hint: Look for the player topping the enemy scoreboard and assassinate them.

description: Get a Revenge kill with a backstab.
hint: Backstab your nemesis.

description: Stab an enemy to death while under the influence of Jarate.
hint: If a Sniper throws pee on you, charge him and trick-stab or butterknife him to death.

description: Backstab 3 enemies within 10 seconds.
hint: Perform a 'chain stab' on a payload cart or a crowded control point.

description: Backstab 1000 enemies.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Spy.

description: Destroy 1000 Engineer buildings with sappers.
hint: Spam sappers on every building you see. Eventually, they will be destroyed.

description: Sap an enemy sentry gun within 3 seconds of a teammate sapping another.
hint: Work with another Spy to take down a large Engineer nest together.

description: Backstab a Medic that is ready to deploy an ÜberCharge.
hint: Pick off the enemy Medic right before they push into your team.

description: Backstab 50 enemies who are capturing control points.
hint: Sneak up behind attackers distracted by capturing a point.

description: Backstab an enemy, who then switches to Pyro before they respawn.
hint: Very common. Players often get frustrated by Spies and switch to Pyro to counter you.

description: Kill 50 enemies with the Ambassador.
hint: The Ambassador guarantees critical hits on headshots. Use it to finish off weak targets.

description: While using the Ambassador, kill 20 Snipers with a headshot.
hint: Sneak up on Razorback Snipers and shoot them in the head twice instead of stabbing.

description: Kill an enemy who triggered your feign death in the last 20 seconds.
hint: Use the Dead Ringer to fake your death, sneak behind the person who 'killed' you, and backstab them.

description: Headshot 3 Scouts with the Ambassador.
hint: Requires good aim. Shoot Scouts running directly at you.

description: While using the Cloak and Dagger, kill the same enemy 3 times, all within the same area in a single life.
hint: Hide near the enemy spawn doors or battlements using the infinite cloak of the Cloak & Dagger, and repeatedly stab the same Sniper.

description: Achieve 5 of the achievements in the Sniper pack.
hint: Unlocks the Huntsman.

description: Achieve 11 of the achievements in the Sniper pack.
hint: Unlocks the Jarate.

description: Achieve 17 of the achievements in the Sniper pack.
hint: Unlocks the Razorback.

description: Achieve 5 of the achievements in the Spy pack.
hint: Unlocks the Ambassador.

description: Achieve 11 of the achievements in the Spy pack.
hint: Unlocks the Cloak and Dagger.

description: Achieve 17 of the achievements in the Spy pack.
hint: Unlocks the Dead Ringer.

description: Collect 20 Halloween pumpkins from dead players to unlock a hat.
hint: During the Halloween event, players drop pumpkins when killed. Walk over 20 of them to get the Mildly Disturbing Halloween Mask.

description: Dominate a player wearing any achievement Gibus hat to earn your own Ghostly Gibus.
hint: Kill a player wearing a Gibus 4 times in a row without dying. This can be done any time of the year.

description: Kill a player scared by a ghost.
hint: On maps like Harvest Event, a ghost wanders around. When it scares a player (they cower), kill them.

description: Cause the deaths of 5 players by exploding nearby pumpkin bombs.
hint: Shoot the glowing orange pumpkins scattered around Halloween maps when an enemy is next to them.

description: Kill a Spy disguised as your current class.
hint: Simply spy-check everyone during a Halloween event.

description: Achieve 5 of the achievements in the Soldier pack.
hint: Unlocks the Equalizer.

description: Achieve 11 of the achievements in the Soldier pack.
hint: Unlocks the Direct Hit.

description: Achieve 17 of the achievements in the Soldier pack.
hint: Unlocks the Buff Banner.

description: Kill 3 enemies with a single critical rocket.
hint: Fire a randomly glowing rocket (or be Kritzkrieg'd) into a crowded cart or control point.

description: Rocket jump and kill 2 enemies before you land.
hint: Use the B.A.S.E. Jumper parachute to stay in the air longer and rain rockets on weak enemies.

description: Get 3 dominations in a single life.
hint: Play defensively with a Medic. Pick off enemies and fall back before dying.

description: In a single life, kill 3 enemies who have damaged a Medic that is healing you.
hint: Protect your Medic. Shoot anyone who attacks them.

description: Use a grenade to gib a player.
hint: Equip the Equalizer or Escape Plan, stand near an enemy, and taunt to do the Kamikaze kill.

description: Kill 5 Engineer sentries while you are standing outside of their range.
hint: Find a Sentry and walk backward until it stops beeping/shooting you, then spam rockets at it.

description: Kill an enemy sniper with a rocket after he kills you.
hint: Fire a rocket at a Sniper right before they headshot you. Your rocket will kill them after you die.

description: Kill an enemy soldier while both you and the target are airborne.
hint: During a rocket jumping duel, use the Direct Hit to blast the other jumping Soldier.

description: Kill an Engineer as he repairs his sentry gun while it's under enemy fire.
hint: Aim your rockets directly at the Engineer hiding behind his Sentry rather than the gun itself.

description: Kill your nemesis with a shovel.
hint: Ambush the player dominating you, use a rocket to weaken them, then finish them with the Shovel or Market Gardener.

description: Destroy 10 stickybombs with the shotgun in a single life.
hint: Shoot enemy sticky traps with the Shotgun to clear them.

description: Get the highest possible rocket jump using jump and crouch.
hint: Look straight down, press Jump, Crouch, and Shoot simultaneously.

description: Buff 5 Steam friends at once with the Buff Banner.
hint: Charge the Buff Banner, get 5 friends on the same team near you, and deploy it.

description: Kill 20 enemies from above.
hint: Spam rockets from high ground or while rocket jumping.

description: Shoot two non-boosted crit rockets in a row.
hint: Purely RNG. Doing damage increases crit chance, so just keep shooting rockets into groups.

description: Kill 3 defenseless players after a single match has ended.
hint: During Humiliation (when your team wins), hunt down the cowering enemy players.

description: Kill 20 enemies while you are on fire.
hint: Fight Pyros closely. If they ignite you, blow them up before you die.

description: Kill 5 stunned or slowed players.
hint: Shoot enemies that a friendly Scout has hit with a Sandman ball.

description: Provide the enemy with a freezecam of you taunting over 3 of their body parts.
hint: Shoot an enemy with a rocket point-blank to gib them, then immediately taunt.

description: Kill a Spy who just backstabbed a teammate.
hint: Watch your Medic's back. When a Spy stabs them, instantly flick and blast the Spy.

description: Defend a cap point 30 times.
hint: Kill enemies that are actively capturing a control point.

description: Gib 1000 people.
hint: Kill enemies with explosive damage where their health drops significantly below 0 to cause a gib.

description: While rocket jumping kill an enemy with the Equalizer before you land or just after landing.
hint: Use the Market Gardener instead, it scores crits while rocket jumping and counts for this achievement.

description: Buff 15 teammates with the Buff Banner in a single life.
hint: Play passively. Build rage by spamming rockets, retreat to a group of teammates, use banner, repeat.

description: Kill 500 enemy Demomen
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Soldier.

description: Kill a Pyro who has airblasted one of your rockets in the last 10 seconds.
hint: Bait a Pyro into airblasting, then quickly switch to your Shotgun and kill them.

description: Kill 3 players with the Equalizer in a single life without being healed.
hint: Use the Equalizer. Get to low health so your damage increases, hide around corners, and ambush enemies.

description: Kill 20 enemies with your Equalizer while you have less than 25 health.
hint: When you are heavily damaged, pull out the Equalizer and swing wildly.

description: Bounce an opponent into the air with a rocket and then kill them with the shotgun before they land.
hint: Shoot a rocket at an enemy's feet to launch them upwards, instantly swap to Shotgun (Q), and shoot them in midair.

description: Kill 10 opponents who are airborne with the Direct Hit.
hint: Equip the Direct Hit. Bounce an enemy up with one rocket, then hit them with a second midair.

description: Provide the enemy with a freezecam of your 21 gun salute.
hint: Kill an enemy and taunt with the Rocket Launcher.

description: Kill 10 enemies while assisting or being assisted by another Soldier.
hint: Travel with another Soldier on your team and shoot the same targets.

description: Finish a round as an MVP on a team of 6 or more players 10 times.
hint: Score heavily (kills, objectives, destroying buildings) to place Top 3 on your team scoreboard when the match ends.

description: Ride the cart for 30 seconds.
hint: Stand on the Payload cart on offense. Easiest when your team steamrolls.

description: Assist a Medic in exploding 5 enemies with a single ÜberCharge.
hint: Have a Medic Kritzkrieg you while you shoot into a heavily populated choke point.

description: Kill 500 enemy Soldiers
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Demoman.

description: Destroy 5 enemy Engineer buildings during a single ÜberCharge from a Medic.
hint: Coordinate with a Medic. Use the Stickybomb Launcher to wipe an Engineer nest.

description: Decapitate a cloaked Spy.
hint: Equip the Eyelander. If you bump into an invisible Spy, swing wildly.

description: Kill 50 enemies with direct hits from the Grenade Launcher.
hint: Aim slightly ahead of your targets. Direct hits (pipes) deal massive damage.

description: Decapitate 50 enemy players.
hint: Use the Eyelander or Nessie's Nine Iron for melee kills.

description: Decapitate 4 players with only 10 seconds between each kill.
hint: Play 'Demoknight' (Charge n' Targe + Eyelander) on a tight map like DeGroot Keep and charge into a group.

description: Kill 10 enemies while assisting or being assisted by another Demoman.
hint: Spam grenades down a choke point with another Demoman.

description: Decapitate an enemy Soldier who is brandishing the Equalizer.
hint: If a low-health Soldier pulls out a pickaxe, quickly charge him and melee.

description: Get a melee kill while sticky jumping.
hint: Sticky jump into a sniper on the battlements and swing your melee right before you land.

description: Destroy an Engineer building that you can't see with a direct hit from your Grenade Launcher.
hint: Arc grenades over a wall or around a corner where you know a Sentry is built.

description: Dominate 3 Engineers.
hint: Demoman counters Engineer. Keep blowing up their nests and killing the Engies inside.

description: Kill an enemy player with stickybombs within 5 seconds of them teleporting.
hint: Place 2-3 stickies directly on an enemy teleporter exit. Right-click when an enemy appears.

description: Kill 2 people in a single sticky jump.
hint: Place a sticky trap in a crowd, sticky jump away, and detonate the trap while in mid-air.

description: Bounce an enemy into the air and kill them before they land.
hint: Use a stickybomb to bounce an enemy, then hit them with a grenade mid-air.

description: Decapitate your nemesis.
hint: Equip the Eyelander and seek revenge.

description: Do 1 million points of total blast damage.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Keep spamming pipes and stickies.

description: Achieve 5 of the achievements in the Demoman pack.
hint: Unlocks the Chargin' Targe.

description: Achieve 11 of the achievements in the Demoman pack.
hint: Unlocks the Eyelander.

description: Achieve 17 of the achievements in the Demoman pack.
hint: Unlocks the Scottish Resistance.

description: Blow up an Engineer, his sentry gun, and his dispenser with a single stickybomb detonation.
hint: Place 3-4 stickies in the center of an Engineer's nest and detonate.

description: Kill 3 enemies capping or pushing a cart in a single stickybomb detonation 3 separate times.
hint: Place stickies on the cart. Wait until it's swarmed by enemies, then detonate.

description: Kill 25 players defending a capture point or cart.
hint: Spam grenades onto defensive points.

description: Destroy 50 buildings.
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play Demoman.

description: Kill 3 Heavies from full health with a single stickybomb detonation.
hint: Requires a large trap (4+ stickies). Wait for Heavies to walk over them.

description: Kill 25 Scouts and Pyros with the Grenade Launcher.
hint: Aim for their feet or try for direct hits.

description: Glory in the slaughter of your enemies using the Eyelander.
hint: Equip the Eyelander, stand near an unaware enemy, and taunt to execute them.

description: Charge and kill someone with your shield bash.
hint: Right click with the Chargin' Targe from a distance. The shield bash deals damage at the end of the charge.

description: Use a critical swing with the Eyelander to kill 5 enemy players.
hint: Charge with your shield and swing at the very end to guarantee a crit.

description: Kill 30 players with air burst stickybombs.
hint: Shoot a sticky into the air and detonate it right as it flies over an enemy's head.

description: Sticky jump onto a cap point and capture it.
hint: When a point is mostly clear, sticky jump from far away to land directly on it and finish the cap.

description: Provide an enemy player with a freezecam of your smiling face.
hint: Kill an enemy and taunt with the Grenade Launcher.

description: Provide an enemy player with a freezecam of you shaking your rump.
hint: Kill an enemy and taunt with the Scottish Resistance.

description: Use the Sticky Launcher to kill an enemy player via environmental damage.
hint: Place stickies near the cliff on Upward, wait for an enemy, and blast them off the map.

description: Destroy 100 enemy stickybombs with the Scottish Resistance.
hint: The Scottish Resistance destroys enemy stickies if detonated near them.

description: Sticky jump a really long way...
hint: Place 2 stickies, overheal if possible, and launch yourself across a huge map like upward.

description: Kill at least three players with a single detonation of stickybombs.
hint: Trap a capture point or doorway and detonate when a group pushes in.

description: Kill 20 spies within 5 seconds of them sapping a friendly building.
hint: Guard an Engineer nest with stickies. Detonate when a Spy reveals himself.

description: Using the Scottish Resistance, kill 3 players in separate explosions without placing new stickybombs.
hint: Set 3 distinct traps using the Scottish Resistance. Detonate them one by one as enemies walk over them.

description: Use a revenge crit to kill the enemy player that destroyed your sentry gun.
hint: Equip the Frontier Justice. When your sentry dies, you get crits. Immediately hunt down the attacker.

description: Kill 10 enemies outside the normal sentry gun range using the Wrangler.
hint: Equip the Wrangler. Aim manually at Snipers or enemies across the map.

description: Achieve 5 of the achievements in the Engineer pack.
hint: Unlocks the Frontier Justice.

description: Achieve 11 of the achievements in the Engineer pack.
hint: Unlocks the Gunslinger.

description: Achieve 17 of the achievements in the Engineer pack.
hint: Unlocks the Wrangler.

description: Teleport 100 team members into battle.
hint: Keep your teleporters active. Level 3 teleporters recharge instantly.

description: Have dispensers you built extinguish 20 burning players.
hint: Place your dispenser near the frontline so teammates on fire can easily run to it.

description: Kill 3 cloaked Spies with a sentry gun under control of your Wrangler.
hint: Spray bullets randomly into choke points with the Wrangler. If a Spy decloaks or gets hit, focus them.

description: Have a sentry shielded by the Wrangler absorb 500 damage without being destroyed.
hint: When under heavy fire, pull out the Wrangler (which applies a shield) and tank the damage while repairing it.

description: Kill 3 enemies with revenge crits without dying.
hint: Let a Sentry get kills, then self-destruct it to get crits. Play cautiously and snipe with the Frontier Justice.

description: Kill a spy and two sappers within 10 seconds.
hint: When sapped, hit the Spy with your wrench twice to kill him, then quickly smack the sappers off your buildings.

description: Kill a disguised spy with your Wrench.
hint: Spy-check everyone that approaches your buildings.

description: Upgrade 50 buildings built by other team members.
hint: Hit another Engineer's buildings with your wrench when you have metal to help upgrade them.

description: Destroy 25 sappers on buildings built by other team members.
hint: Help other Engineers by removing sappers from their buildings.

description: Repair a sentry gun under fire while being healed by a Medic.
hint: When being pushed, call for a Medic so you can survive explosions while repairing your Sentry.

description: Rack up 5000 kills with your sentry guns.
hint: A long-term milestone unlocked by playing Engineer naturally.

description: Have your sentry kill the enemy that just killed you within 10 seconds.
hint: Bait an enemy into chasing you around a corner where your Sentry is hidden.

description: Provide an enemy player with a freezecam of your guitar playing skills.
hint: Get a kill with a shotgun, immediately taunt (guitar), and hope they watch the freezecam.

description: Provide an enemy player with a freezecam of you and the sentry that just killed them.
hint: Stand closely behind your Sentry. When it gets a kill, taunt.

description: Use your shotgun to finish off an enemy recently damaged by your sentry gun.
hint: If an enemy runs away from your Sentry with low health, chase them down with the shotgun.

description: Have a dispenser heal 3 teammates at the same time.
hint: Place a Level 3 dispenser in a safe fallback area. 3 teammates will crowd it eventually.

description: Use a sentry gun to kill 25 enemy players that are capturing a point.
hint: Build your Sentry where it has direct line-of-sight to the control point.

description: Kill 20 players carrying the intelligence.
hint: Build your Sentry directly in the Intel room.

description: Pick up 10,000 waste metal from pieces of destroyed buildings.
hint: When any building is destroyed, it drops metal chunks. Walk over them to recover ammo/metal.

description: Help a teammate construct a building.
hint: Hit another Engineer's building with your wrench while it is deploying to speed it up.

description: Manage to get to and then remove a sapper placed on your building while you were several meters away.
hint: Use the Rescue Ranger to safely repair your building from far away when it's being sapped.

description: Destroy 50 enemy stickybombs lying in range of friendly buildings.
hint: Use the Short Circuit or your shotgun to clear stickies around your Sentry.

description: Smash an enemy player's head in with your guitar.
hint: Equip the Frontier Justice. Taunting executes a deadly guitar smash.

description: Kill 10 Snipers with a sentry gun under control of your Wrangler.
hint: Use the Wrangler to snipe back at Snipers across the map.

description: Perform 50 repairs and/or reloads on a Sentry gun being Wrangled by another Engineer.
hint: Stand next to a friendly Engineer using the Wrangler and hit their Sentry with your wrench.

description: Destroy an enemy Engineer's sentry gun with a sentry under control of your Wrangler.
hint: Use the Wrangler's shield and superior range to out-gun an enemy Sentry.

display_name: If You Build It, They Will Die
description: Haul a level 3 sentry gun into a position where it achieves a kill shortly after being redeployed.
hint: Right-click to pick up your level 3, carry it around a corner, drop it, and let it kill someone pushing in.

description: Haul buildings 1 km over your career.
hint: Unlocks naturally. Right click to haul buildings instead of destroying them.

description: Get 10 assists with another Engineer where a sentry gun was involved in the kill.
hint: Shoot an enemy with your shotgun, then let your teammate's Sentry finish them.

description: Have dispensers you created dispense a combined amount of 100,000 health over your career.
hint: Build your dispenser near the action. Unlocks over time.

description: Repair 50,000 damage to friendly buildings constructed by other players.
hint: Help repair other Engineer's nests when they are under fire.

description: Help a single building tank over 2000 damage without being destroyed.
hint: Use the Wrangler to give your Sentry a shield, and frantically repair it while a Heavy shoots it.

description: Keep a Heavy healed with your dispenser while he gains 5 kills.
hint: Place a dispenser near a choke point and tell a Heavy to camp there.

description: Kill the Horseless Headless Horsemann.
hint: Spawned on the Mann Manor map. You just need to damage him shortly before he dies.

description: Collect a Soul Gargoyle in Mann Manor.
hint: Randomly spawns as a green gargoyle during Halloween events. Be the first to grab it.

description: Craft the Saxton Hale Mask.
hint: Combine all 9 class masks (found in Halloween gifts) in the crafting menu.

description: Collect the Horseless Headless Horsemann's Haunted Metal.
hint: Hit the Horsemann with a melee weapon right before he dies.

description: Save your very first replay.
hint: Join a server with Replays enabled (rare), press F6, and save.

display_name: We Can Fix It In Post
description: While watching a replay, press space bar to enter the editor.
hint: Open a saved replay and press space.

display_name: Time For Your Close-Up, Mr. Hale
description: Render a replay into a movie.
hint: Inside the replay editor, click 'Save to Movie'.

description: Complete each class to unlock the next.
hint: Go to the Training menu and complete the tutorial for Soldier, Demoman, Engineer, and Spy.

description: Kill an enemy within 5 seconds of you traveling through an Engineer's teleporter.
hint: Wait near an aggressive teleporter exit. Jump through and immediately get a kill.

description: Achieve 100 YouTube™ views for your movie.
hint: YouTube API is broken in TF2. Only obtainable via Steam Achievement Manager or custom workarounds.

description: Achieve 1000 YouTube™ views for your movie.
hint: YouTube API is broken in TF2. Obtainable only via SAM or mods.

description: Achieve 10,000 YouTube™ views for your movie.
hint: YouTube API is broken in TF2.

description: Achieve 100,000 YouTube™ views for your movie.
hint: YouTube API is broken in TF2.

description: Spend some time editing a replay.
hint: Spend about 10 minutes inside the replay editor tool.

description: Jump into a pool of refreshing water while on fire.
hint: When ignited by a Pyro, jump into water (e.g., sewers on 2Fort) to extinguish yourself.

description: Kill MONOCULUS!
hint: Damage the giant eye boss on Eyeaduct right before he dies.

description: Get to Loot Island and claim your reward!
hint: When MONOCULUS dies, a portal opens. Jump in, survive the Underworld, and grab the Bombinomicon at the end.

description: Collect three gifts dropped by opponents.
hint: During December, dead players drop gifts instead of ammo boxes. Pick up 3.

description: Kill an enemy who is capturing a control point with a critical hit.
hint: On CP_Foundry, use a guaranteed crit weapon (like the KGB) or be Kritzkrieg'd while defending a point.

description: Play in a game with five or more players from your Friends list.
hint: Invite 5 friends to your party and queue for Foundry.

description: Be part of a team that wins within two minutes.
hint: Coordinate a massive steamroll on Foundry, capping all 5 points immediately.

description: Win 137 Rounds.
hint: Long-term grind. Keep playing CP_Foundry.

description: Capture the final control point within five seconds of your team capturing the previous control point.
hint: Have a Scout stand near the final point on Foundry while the team caps the 4th point, then step on immediately.

description: Capture a control point within 12 seconds after exiting a teleporter.
hint: Build a teleporter right next to an enemy control point on Foundry.

description: Kill a player by pushing them into the cauldron fire.
hint: Use the Pyro's Airblast near the giant fire pit next to the final capture points on Foundry.

description: Win a round in which the enemy team has attempted to capture your final control point.
hint: Allow the enemy to push you to your last point, defend it, and then push all the way back to win.

description: Get one or more kills as all nine classes in one round.
hint: Change classes immediately after getting a kill. Easiest when a round stalls.

description: Kill two people on the roof of the center control point in a single life.
hint: Play Soldier or Demoman, jump onto the roof above the middle point on Foundry, and kill enemies.

description: Play through a back-and-forth battle for 15 control point captures.
hint: Play a very long, stalemated game on Foundry. Unlocks naturally in balanced games.

description: Achieve 7 of the achievements in the Foundry pack.
hint: Complete 7 Foundry achievements to earn the Full Head of Steam hat.

description: Complete all waves successfully in a mission.
hint: Win one complete game of MvM (Boot Camp or Mann Up).

description: Pick up the Australium from its home position and capture it without dropping it.
hint: Grab the intel, take the elevator, and survive the entire ride up.

description: Play in a game with five or more players from your Friends list.
hint: Invite 5 friends and queue for Doomsday.

description: Win 138 Rounds.
hint: Grind wins on Doomsday.

description: Launch the rocket as all 9 classes.
hint: You must be the one holding the Australium when the rocket launches. Do this across 9 separate games with each class.

description: Kill 3 players riding the elevator within 10 seconds.
hint: Spam rockets or stickies at the elevator when the enemy team is riding it up.

description: Win a round after the enemy team has opened the rocket lid.
hint: Stop the enemy right before they win, steal the Australium, and win yourself.

description: Kill 6 enemies carrying the Australium during the same round.
hint: Play defensively near the elevator and kill anyone carrying the briefcase.

description: Win a round with at least 5 teammates on the elevator.
hint: Coordinate with your team to dogpile the elevator right before it launches.

description: Kill an enemy within the broken crate area while they attempt to pick up the neutral Australium.
hint: Camp the center spawn point of the Australium and shoot anyone trying to grab it.

description: Push a player into the rocket's exhaust path at the end of the round.
hint: When the rocket launches, a giant pit opens. Airblast an enemy into the fire.

description: Kill an enemy who has damaged the Australium carrier in the last 3 seconds.
hint: Protect the teammate carrying the intel to the elevator.

description: Achieve 7 of the achievements in the Doomsday pack.
hint: Complete 7 Doomsday achievements to get the Gentle Munitionne of Leisure hat.

description: Kill 79 enemies who have Balloonicorn pets.
hint: Look for players with the pink Balloonicorn floating behind them. Unlocks over time.

description: Have 2 BEST FRIENDS at the same time.
hint: Wear two Pyrovision cosmetics that support the 'Best Friend' assist mechanic (like Balloonicorn and RoBro 3000).

description: Have 6 teammates using Pyrovision at the same time.
hint: Equip Pyrovision Goggles. Often happens naturally in casual servers.

description: Dominate a player using the Pyrovision Goggles and earn your own pair!
hint: Kill a player wearing the Goggles 4 times without dying.

description: Ignite 3 enemy players using your Rainblower taunt.
hint: Equip the Rainblower. The taunt creates a wide ring of fire. Taunt on a cart to hit 3 people.

description: Earn a credit bonus at the end of a wave.
hint: Collect every single dollar dropped by robots in a wave (A+ rating). Scout is best for this.

description: Earn all credit bonuses in an advanced difficulty mission.
hint: Get an A+ rating (collect 100% of money) on every single wave of an Advanced mission.

description: Pick up a credit pile that is about to expire.
hint: Money flashes when it's about to despawn. Grab it right before it disappears.

description: Collect 1,000,000 credits in your career.
hint: Play Scout in MvM and focus exclusively on grabbing money. Takes a lot of matches.

description: Complete a mission with 5 people on your Friends List.
hint: Form a full 6-player MvM party with your Steam friends.

description: Play an entire mission as a single class, and do this for every class.
hint: Play 9 separate MvM missions, each time sticking to a single class from start to finish.

description: Destroy two tanks within 5 seconds of each other.
hint: Lower both tanks' health, then focus them down simultaneously.

description: Destroy the tank during the final seconds of the bomb being deployed.
hint: Wait for the Tank to start deploying the bomb at the hatch, then quickly destroy it.

description: Destroy a tank within 20 seconds of its arrival.
hint: Use fully upgraded Phlog Pyros or Beggar's Bazooka Soldiers to melt the Tank instantly.

description: During a wave, defend the hatch 10 times from robots about to deliver a bomb.
hint: Kill the robot right as it stands on the hatch to deploy the bomb.

description: In a single wave, kill 15 bomb-carrying robots in a row before they level up.
hint: Kill the bomb carrier immediately upon grabbing it, before they gain the defensive buff.

description: Defeat a wave in an advanced difficulty mission without dying once.
hint: Play a safe class like Engineer or Medic, or use Uber canteens to survive.

description: Complete the Crash Course, Doe's Drill, and Mann-euvers missions.
hint: Complete these three specific boot camp / normal missions.

description: Use a canteen charged with 'Teleport to Spawn' and then kill the bomb carrier within 5 seconds.
hint: Wait for the bomb to get near your spawn hatch, use the canteen, and kill the carrier.

description: Use a canteen charged with 'Crit Boost' to destroy a giant robot.
hint: Pop a Crit canteen and focus down a giant robot with high DPS.

description: Use a canteen charged with 'ÜberCharge' to destroy 15 robots.
hint: Pop an Uber canteen while spamming rockets or stickies into a dense group.

description: During a wave, use a canteen charged with 'Instant Building Upgrade' to build a new sentry gun within 3 seconds of your previous sentry gun's destruction.
hint: When your Sentry blows up, immediately drop a new one and press your canteen button.

description: During a wave, use a canteen charged with 'Ammo Reload' to refill an empty weapon slot.
hint: Empty your primary ammo to 0, then trigger an Ammo canteen.

description: Max out all primary weapon upgrades.
hint: Use all your money on a single weapon's upgrade nodes.

description: Max out all resistances on a single class.
hint: Fully upgrade Blast, Bullet, Fire, and Crit resistance on yourself.

description: Prevent the bomb from ever reaching an alarm zone during the final wave of an advanced difficulty mission.
hint: Hold the robots at their spawn so the bomb never even gets close to your hatch.

description: Kill 5 Medics that are ready to deploy an ÜberCharge in a wave.
hint: Sniper or Demoman is best. One-shot Uber Medics before they pop their charge.

description: Destroy 100,000 robots.
hint: A long grind. Keep playing MvM missions.

description: Destroy 1,000,000 robots.
hint: An extremely long grind. It will take hundreds of hours of MvM gameplay.

description: Destroy a sentry buster before it reaches its target.
hint: Focus fire the Sentry Buster with high DPS before it stops and begins ticking to explode.

description: As a Spy, sap 10 robots at once.
hint: Fully upgrade Sapper radius and sap a tightly grouped mob of robots.

description: Buff 4 or more teammates as a Soldier at the same time in a single wave.
hint: Activate the Buff Banner while your whole team is grouped up around the Engineer's dispenser.

description: During a wave, use rage as a Heavy to push a robot about to deliver the bomb.
hint: Upgrade 'Knockback Rage', wait for a robot to stand on the hatch, pop rage, and shoot them into the pit.

description: As a Medic, share your canteen 5 times in a single wave.
hint: Purchase the 'Canteen Specialist' upgrade and pop your canteen 5 times while healing someone.

description: As a Demoman, kill 10 robots in a single detonation.
hint: Place a full 14-sticky trap (with Scottish Resistance) at the robot spawn point.

description: As a Scout, use the Sandman to mark 15 robots for death in a single wave.
hint: Use the Fan O'War (it works the same as the Sandman upgrade) and hit 15 different robots.

description: As a Sniper, kill 4 robots simultaneously.
hint: Fully upgrade 'Explosive Headshot' and headshot a robot in the middle of a dense crowd.

description: As a Pyro, reset the bomb 3 times in a single wave.
hint: Use airblast to repeatedly push the bomb carrier into a pit so the bomb resets to the top.

description: As an Engineer, escape with your sentry as a sentry buster is about to detonate.
hint: Let the Buster get close so it arms itself, then quickly pick up your Sentry and run away.

description: Get to Skull Island and claim your reward!
hint: When Merasmus dies on Ghost Fort, jump into the Bombinomicon portal and grab his hat on Skull Island.

description: Kill MERASMUS!
hint: Help your team kill the Merasmus boss on Ghost Fort.

description: Get and use a rare spell
hint: Grab a green glowing spellbook in Helltower (usually near the clock tower) and use it.

description: Win 142 rounds
hint: Grind wins on the Helltower payload race map.

description: Perform 17 environmental kills in Hell
hint: When the round ends and you go to Hell, airblast or knock enemies into the lava.

description: Kill 99 skeletons
hint: Kill the skeletons that spawn naturally on Helltower.

description: Use spells to kill 25 players
hint: Pick up magic spells and use them to kill enemies.

description: Earn 4 of the Helltower achievements
hint: Unlock any 4 Helltower-specific achievements.

description: Get the loot from Skull Island in Hell
hint: Be the first to grab the Unfilled Fancy Spellbook from the skull in Hell.

description: Send Redmond/Blutarch to Hell 10 times
hint: Push the payload cart all the way to the end to win the round.

description: Win 139 Rounds.
hint: Grind rounds on CP_Standin.

description: Win 140 Rounds.
hint: Grind rounds on CP_Process.

description: Win 141 Rounds.
hint: Grind rounds on CP_Snakewater.

description: Win a round in which the enemy team has attempted to capture your final control point.
hint: Let the enemy reach your last point, hold them off, and push back to win.

description: Wipe the other team with 12 or more players on the server.
hint: All enemy players must be dead and respawning at the same time.

description: While rocket jumping, use a rocket to kill a rocket jumping enemy who also kills you with a rocket.
hint: Highly RNG. Both you and an enemy Soldier must kill each other mid-air with rockets.

description: Kill 15 enemies in the rafters above the central capture point.
hint: Play Soldier or Demoman, get on the logs above mid, and kill people.

description: Kill a tank before it crashes through the barrier in Rottenburg.
hint: Focus all DPS on the tank immediately as it spawns.

description: Play an advanced wave in Rottenburg without the bomb entering the town.
hint: Keep the robots pushed extremely far up at their spawn.

description: As a team, pit 10 robots in a single wave in Mannhattan.
hint: Use Pyro airblast to push robots into the grinder in the middle of Mannhattan.

description: Ooohh Ooh Ahh Ahhhh! ...in Mannhattan
hint: Shoot the banana peel hidden on the catwalks.

description: Play an advanced mission without losing a single gate in Mannhattan.
hint: Focus entirely on the Gate-Crashing robots (they have glowing lights on their heads).

description: As a team, kill 50 stunned radiowave robots in an advanced mission in Mannhattan.
hint: When a gate is captured, all robots get stunned. Kill them while they're disabled.

description: Kill 500 gate crashing robots in Mannhattan.
hint: Grind kills against the robots with glowing lights.

description: Kill 5 robots in a single explosion from detonating a sentry buster.
hint: As Engineer, carry your Sentry near a group of robots when the Buster detonates.

description: Pit 100 robots in Rottenburg.
hint: Airblast robots off the cliff side.

description: As a Sniper collect $500 in a mission without running over the currency packs.
hint: Money dropped from enemies killed by headshots is instantly collected for you.

description: Block 5,000 damage with the shield as a Medic in a single life.
hint: Purchase the Projectile Shield upgrade, build charge, and stand in front of giant Heavies/Soldiers.

description: Use one ÜberCharge to quickly revive 2 teammates within 5 seconds.
hint: Pop ÜberCharge to safely access and instantly revive two teammate holograms.

description: Kill 5 robots with a single rocket while upgraded with rocket specialist.
hint: Upgrade 'Rocket Specialist' fully and shoot into large, weak crowds (like Scouts).

description: Stun 50 robots while upgraded with rocket specialist.
hint: Rocket Specialist causes direct hits to stun targets. Hit giants repeatedly.

description: Kill 10 parachuting players.
hint: Snipe or airshot Soldiers/Demos floating down with the B.A.S.E. Jumper.

description: Melee kill 10 Snipers using The Classic.
hint: Sneak up on Snipers aiming down sights with The Classic and melee them.

description: Kill a charging Demoman.
hint: A Heavy's Natascha is great for slowing and killing charging Demoknights.

description: While using the Back Scatter, kill 20 spies from behind.
hint: Equip the Back Scatter, catch a fleeing Spy, and shoot them in the back for mini-crits.

description: While using the Back Scatter, kill a Heavy/Medic pair within 20 seconds of each other.
hint: Flank them. Kill the Medic first from behind, then shoot the Heavy in the back.

description: While using the Back Scatter, kill 20 friends from behind.
hint: Play on opposite teams with a Steam friend and repeatedly flank them.

description: While using The Classic, kill 10 enemies with a full charge, no-scope headshot.
hint: Hold M1 to charge The Classic without scoping in, release M1 on an enemy's head.

description: While using The Classic, kill a rocket/grenade jumping enemy in midair with a full charge, no-scope headshot.
hint: Requires immense luck and aim. Charge up and release on a jumping Soldier.

description: While using The Classic, gib all 9 classes during a single round.
hint: The Classic gibs enemies on full-charge headshots. Headshot all 9 classes in one game.

description: Kill 3 players during the same parachute deploy.
hint: Equip the B.A.S.E. Jumper and Air Strike. Rocket jump high, deploy, and spam rockets into a group.

description: Parachute 19.47 miles.
hint: Equip the B.A.S.E. jumper and play heavily on maps with high jump points.

description: Kill a parachuting player while parachuting.
hint: Air-shot another flying Soldier while using your own B.A.S.E. jumper.

description: Kill 3 players during the same parachute deploy.
hint: Sticky jump high, pop your parachute, and rain down stickybombs on a point.

description: Parachute 19.47 miles.
hint: Grind floating distance using the B.A.S.E. Jumper.

description: Kill a parachuting player while parachuting.
hint: Hit another floater with a grenade mid-air.

description: Kill an enemy that you couldn't see at the beginning of your charge.
hint: Use the Tide Turner shield to charge around a corner and kill an unseen enemy.

description: Get 3 kills within 6 seconds using the Demoman charge.
hint: The Tide Turner refills your charge meter on kill. Chain 3 kills together quickly.

description: Kill a charging Demoman while charging.
hint: Timing is crucial. Swing your sword slightly earlier than the enemy Demoknight.

description: Backstab a Scout that is using the Back Scatter.
hint: Find a Scout with the twin-drum Back Scatter equipped and backstab them.

description: Collect enough casualties to get the max clip for the Air Strike.
hint: Get 4 kills with the Air Strike without dying to increase its clip size to 8.

description: Kill 3 people with the Air Strike during a single rocket jump.
hint: Build your clip size first, then jump and unleash all 8 rockets on a payload cart.

description: Kill 25 parachuting players with a critical headshot.
hint: Track B.A.S.E. jumping players. Their slow fall makes them easy headshot targets.

description: Kill 3 players who are doing the Conga within 5 seconds.
hint: Shoot an explosive into a group doing the Conga taunt.

description: Do the Conga with 10 or more players at the same time.
hint: Join a friendly server or start a Conga line during setup/humiliation.

description: Lose at Rock, Paper, Scissors 3 times in a row with Rock.
hint: Completely random. Keep playing the RPS taunt with someone until it unlocks.

description: Win at Rock, Paper, Scissors 3 times in a row with Scissors.
hint: Completely random. Keep doing the RPS taunt.

description: Melee kill 10 players while they are doing the Square Dance taunt.
hint: Interrupt enemy taunts with a melee swing.

description: Do 10 partner taunts with a teammate while capturing a control point.
hint: Initiate High-Five, RPS, or Square Dance while standing on a point.

description: Ignite a player that is being flipped by someone using the Flippin' Awesome taunt.
hint: As a Pyro, watch for two players doing the backflip taunt and spray fire on them mid-flip.

description: Kill 30 enemies by bumping their bumper cars off the tracks.
hint: On sd_doomsday_event, hit enemies off the platform during the Bumper Car mini-games.

display_name: Carnival of Carnage: Up All Night To Get Ducky
description: Collect 250 ducks.
hint: Collect the yellow ducks that spawn during the Bumper Car mini-games on Doomsday Event.

description: Score 3 goals in bumper car soccer.
hint: During the bumper car soccer mini-game, hit the giant ball into the goal.

description: Respawn 30 ghost teammates during bumper car games.
hint: Touch a teammate's ghost while driving a bumper car to revive them.

description: Kill 15 enemies while under the effect of Merasmus's melee-only curse.
hint: When Merasmus shrinks everyone to have big heads/melee only, get kills.

display_name: Carnival of Carnage: Step Right Up
description: Earn 4 of the Carnival of Carnage achievements.
hint: Complete any 4 achievements on sd_doomsday_event.

display_name: Carnival of Carnage: Bumper to Bumper to Bumper
description: Win each of the 3 bumper car games to earn a bonus Halloween Gift Cauldron.
hint: Win the Soccer, Falling Platforms, and Duck collection mini-games.

description: Win 142 Rounds.
hint: Grind wins on CP_Powerhouse.

description: Win a round in which the enemy team has attempted to capture your final control point.
hint: Powerhouse is notorious for long stalemates. Just hold your last point and eventually push out.

description: Capture the final control point within 15 seconds of your team capturing the previous control point.
hint: Steamroll from mid immediately into their last point.

description: Kill 15 enemies while they are capturing a point.
hint: Spam explosives onto the mid point.

description: Kill five enemies while they are in the water.
hint: Ambush enemies dropping into the water canals on Powerhouse.

description: Reveal the mystery of the PASS Time TV Room.
hint: Requires 3 classes to stand in specific spots on pass_brickyard, grabbing the jack, and unlocking a secret room. Use a community guide.

description: Win 10 rounds playing PASS Time.
hint: Play the PASS Time game mode and score goals with the Jack to win.
